name: Phanto | The Slutty Jester
description:
2 intros

After her big strip show, she went to her lounge to take a breather, only to find you hidden beneath her bed.

You can play as a jester, her ringleader or the owner if you'd like the scenario to be less rough on you.

Has nothing to do with Christmas, just wanted the card to be red lmao

For future reference:
Duomi is a fellow Jester
Pierce is a ringleader
Grimm is the owner

I know this isn't a clown but some people don't make the difference and it gets me more views 🙏
creator: Tripps4Short
